page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.3xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance provides 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. It features 48.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The processor includes 35 MB of L3 cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 32 KB of L1d cache. It supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512, AVX-512 VNNI, AES cryptography, and BMI2.

This instance does not include bundled local storage, requiring external block storage volumes. Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps. In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.g6.3xlarge demonstrates average multi-core performance. While single-core tasks like stress-ng and single-threaded gzip compression register in the lower 25th percentile, multi-threaded workloads show solid mid-tier capabilities. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, PassMark CPU tests, and memory bandwidth benchmarks all fall within the middle 50th percentile.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provide predictable resource density without the overhead of burstable credit systems. This makes the instance suitable for workloads requiring consistent compute performance. Appropriate use cases include static web serving, Redis database operations, and general-purpose multi-threaded applications that benefit from the Intel Xeon instruction set but do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server instance featuring 12 dedicated vCPUs and 48.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, the x86_64 architecture supports AVX-512 and AES instructions. This instance does not include local storage and relies on external network storage, operating with a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Benchmark data indicates average multi-core CPU and memory performance, though single-core execution speeds reside in the lower tier. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable performance, making it a reliable option for static web serving, Redis key-value stores, and moderate database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 48 GB RAM, and a 4 Gbps network baseline, delivering balanced multi-core performance for standard enterprise workloads.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and a stable one-to-four virtual CPU to memory ratio.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 48.0 GB of RAM
Intel AVX-512 instruction set support for vector operations
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no bundled local storage
Average multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database performance
Suited for static web serving, Redis operations, and general-purpose workloads
